阿瓦隆·法斯特 Avalon Fast

writer.name: 露易丝·韦尔德 Louise Weard

director.name: 露易丝·韦尔德 Louise Weard

this_title: Castration Movie Chapter iii. Junior Ghosts - Premorphic Drift; a fragmentary passage
introduction: A young woman seeks out everything in her power to stop her partner from transitioning in this feature-length excerpt from Louise Weard’s Castration Movie, a labyrinthine post-modern epic about gender in several chapters.
chinese_title: Castration Movie Chapter iii. Junior Ghosts - Premorphic Drift; a fragmentary passage
